data.name: TaxFreeChildcare_Name
data.value: Tax-Free Childcare

data.name: TaxFreeChildcare_Description
data.value: Up to £2,000 a year towards childcare costs or £4,000 if your child is disabled

data.name: UniversalCreditChildcare_Name
data.value: Universal Credit childcare

data.name: UniversalCreditChildcare_Description
data.value: Claim back up to £1,071 of childcare costs a month (or £1,836 for 2 or more children)

data.name: ThirtyHoursForWorkingFamilies_Name
data.value: Free Childcare for Working Parents

data.name: ThirtyHoursForWorkingFamilies_Description
data.value: 30 hours of childcare a week during term time (38 weeks)

data.name: FifteenHoursForDisadvantagedChildren_Name
data.value: Early learning for 2-year-olds

data.name: FifteenHoursForDisadvantagedChildren_Description
data.value: 15 hours of childcare a week during term time (38 weeks)

data.name: FifteenHoursUniversal_Name
data.value: 15 hours free childcare for 3 and 4-year-olds

data.name: FifteenHoursUniversal_Description
data.value: 15 hours of childcare a week during term time (38 weeks)

data.name: WhenToApply_AskProviderOrCouncil
data.value: Ask your childcare provider or local council

data.name: WhenToApply_Now
data.value: Now

data.name: WhenToApply_WhenBorn
data.value: When they are born

data.name: WhenToApply_WhenTwentyThreeWeeksOld
data.value: When they are 23 weeks old

data.name: WhenToApply_FromDate
data.value: From {0:dd MMM yyyy}

data.name: WhenToApply_ByDate
data.value: By {0:dd MMM yyyy}

data.name: WhenToApply_FromToDate
data.value: From {0:dd MMM yyyy} To {0:dd MMM yyyy}

data.name: Starts_Now
data.value: Now

data.name: Starts_WhenReturnToWork
data.value: When you return to work

data.name: Starts_FromDate
data.value: From {0:dd MMM yyyy}

data.name: Starts_ThirtyHours_WhenChildTurnsNineMonths
data.value: When you can get your hours will depend on when {0} turns 9 months old

data.name: Starts_FifteenHoursUniversal_FromDate
data.value: You can get it from the term after your child's 3rd birthday, starting on {0:dd MMMM yyyy}

data.name: Starts_FifteenHoursUniversal_TermAfterTurnsThree
data.value: The term after {0} turns 3

data.name: Ends_TaxFreeChildcare
data.value: When {0} turns 12 (or 17 if they have a disability)

data.name: Ends_UniversalCreditChildcare
data.value: 31 August after {0} turns 16

data.name: Ends_ThirtyHoursForWorkingFamilies
data.value: When {0} turns 5 or starts school

data.name: Ends_FifteenHoursForDisadvantagedChildren
data.value: When {0} turns 3

data.name: Ends_FifteenHoursUniversal
data.value: When {0} turns 5 or starts school

data.name: TaxFreeChildcare_Paragraph1
data.value: Help paying childcare costs for working families.

data.name: TaxFreeChildcare_Paragraph2
data.value: You can get up to £500 every 3 months (up to £2,000 a year) towards childcare costs.

data.name: TaxFreeChildcare_Paragraph3
data.value: If your child has a disability, this increases to £1,000 every 3 months (up to £4,000 a year).

data.name: UniversalCreditChildcare_Paragraph1
data.value: Help paying for childcare if you are on Universal Credit.

data.name: UniversalCreditChildcare_Paragraph2
data.value: You can claim back up to £1,071 of childcare costs a month (or £1,836 for 2 or more children).

data.name: ThirtyHoursForWorkingFamilies_Paragraph1
data.value: Funded childcare for children whose parents are working.

data.name: ThirtyHoursForWorkingFamilies_Paragraph2
data.value: You can get up to 30 hours of childcare each week during term time (38 weeks a year). You may be able to spread these hours across the year if your provider offers this.

data.name: ThirtyHoursForWorkingFamilies_Paragraph3
data.value: You may still need to pay for things like meals or activities.

data.name: FifteenHoursForDisadvantagedChildren_Paragraph1
data.value: Funded childcare for 2-year-olds if you or your child get some extra support.

data.name: FifteenHoursForDisadvantagedChildren_Paragraph2
data.value: You can get 15 hours of childcare each week during term time (38 weeks a year). You may be able to spread these hours across the year if your provider offers this.

data.name: FifteenHoursForDisadvantagedChildren_Paragraph3
data.value: You may still need to pay for things like meals or activities.

data.name: FifteenHoursUniversal_Paragraph1
data.value: All 3 and 4 year-olds in England can get funded childcare.

data.name: FifteenHoursUniversal_Paragraph2
data.value: You can get 15 hours of childcare each week during term time (38 weeks a year). You may be able to spread these hours across the year if your provider offers this.

data.name: FifteenHoursUniversal_Paragraph3
data.value: You may still need to pay for things like meals or activities.
